{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}News - The Free News Source{% endblock %} {% block content %}
{% set featured = recent_articles[0] if recent_articles else None %} {% set left_articles = recent_articles[1:3] if recent_articles|length > 1 else [] %} {% set right_articles = recent_articles[3:6] if recent_articles|length > 3 else [] %}
{% if left_articles|length > 0 %} {% for article in left_articles %}

{{ article.title }}

{% if article.title|length > 80 %} {{ article.title[:77] }}... {% else %} Community-written news from around the world, available under a free license. {% endif %}

{% if article.date %} {{ article.date.strftime('%B %d, %Y') }} {% else %} Recently {% endif %} News
{% endfor %} {% endif %}
{% if featured %}

{{ featured.title }}

{% if featured.title|length > 120 %} {{ featured.title[:117] }}... {% else %} Community-written news from around the world, available under a free license. This article provides detailed coverage of current events. {% endif %}

{% if featured.date %} {{ featured.date.strftime('%B %d, %Y') }} {% else %} Recently {% endif %} News
{% endif %}
{% if right_articles|length > 0 %} {% for article in right_articles %}

{{ article.title }}

{% if article.title|length > 100 %} {{ article.title[:97] }}... {% else %} Community-written news from around the world, available under a free license. {% endif %}

{% if article.date %} {{ article.date.strftime('%B %d, %Y') }} {% else %} Recently {% endif %} News
{% if not loop.last %}
{% endif %}
{% endfor %} {% endif %}
{% endblock %}
